hero_lead: If you are struggling with anxiety or depression or relationship distress, you don't have to figure it out alone. _I'm here to help._
change_p1: Maybe you wake up anxious and can't explain why. Maybe you've been running on empty for so long that you've forgotten what it feels like to just _be okay._ Maybe something happened, or a lot of things happened, and the weight of it is finally catching up with you.
change_p2: Whatever brought you here, I want you to know: reaching out takes courage.
closer: I believe you are wired to thrive, and if something is getting in the way of that, I'm here to help. You don't have to do this alone.
meet_p1: I'm a Licensed Clinical Social Worker, and I do this work because I genuinely believe people can heal. Not just cope, but actually transform the relationship they have with themselves and their lives.
meet_p2: My approach is warm, collaborative, and actively engaged. I work alongside you, genuinely invested in your healing and in you.
